ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output text/csv --- [ { name: "Alice", age: "28", city: "Hyderabad" }, { name: "Bob", age: "32", city: "Bangalore" }, { name: "Charlie", age: "25", city: "Chennai" } ]
%dw 2.0 input payload text/csv output application/json --- payload map (row) -> { name: row.name, age: row.age as Number, city: row.city, upperName: upper(row.name) }
